name: Blood + Thunder: The Sound of Alberts
original_name: Blood + Thunder: The Sound of Alberts
overview: This two-part documentary looks back to the '60s and '70s and charts how Australia got its own rock 'n' roll sound thanks to the life-long bond between music company Albert Productions and The Youngs.

trailers.title: Blood+Thunder: The Story of Alberts, Beyond Screen Production
